tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: The midterm is tomorrow, so skipping review to go out feels risky, but the social pressure is low and I'm too tired to study more anyway.
I pushed through the fatigue to boost my midterm prep, so skipping the club call was worth it. Mina is gone now, but I'm glad I didn't risk my grades.
That last hour of cramming actually pushed my prep to 0.83, which feels good for tomorrow's exam even though I'm still exhausted.
My prep hit 0.96, so the late-night grind was worth it despite my exhaustion. I can finally stop worrying about failing tomorrow.
I finally told Mina I'm done and sleeping, which avoids the awkwardness of her waiting. Now I can just crash without stressing about replying.
The deadline passed with unfinished prep, but I'm already awake and ready to face the exam now.
The extra two hours finally pushed my prep to 1.0, so the midterm is locked in and I can stop worrying about it.
I locked in the club night with Mina, clearing that social obligation so I can focus purely on the exam now.
The club was easy, but my priority is still the exam. I'm ready to go back to work now.
Mina's laundry message confirms the social obligation is fully resolved. With the exam locked and stress low, I can finally return to my coursework without distraction.
The system confirms 'assignment_A' is gone, so I can stop searching and immediately pivot back to my exam prep without wasting any more time.
The midterm is locked in and stress is low, so I can stop worrying about the future. Since there's nothing left to do, I might as well quit now.

desires: Stop thinking about work entirely now that the exam is secured and I've cleared my social obligations
Avoid any new tasks or responsibilities that would force me to plan for tomorrow or later this week
Stay in a state of zero stress by ignoring the laundry until it absolutely cannot be delayed

goals.description: Immediately disengage from all academic tasks and close study materials to celebrate the secured exam.
goals.rationale: My achievement axis is satisfied; the 'win' is locked in. My impulsive nature now demands an immediate reward (leisure) rather than continuing to grind for no tangible gain. I want zero stress right now.

goals.description: Decline or ignore any incoming social invitations that require planning or commitment for later this week.
goals.rationale: I am avoiding conflict and future planning. Saying 'no' or ignoring invites protects my current state of relaxation and prevents me from having to negotiate a schedule, which feels like work.

goals.description: Do absolutely nothing about laundry until the deadline is imminent or clothes run out.
goals.rationale: The task has a soft deadline (Sunday) and low value to my achievement axis. My short planning horizon means I will happily risk the future inconvenience to maintain my current zero-stress, lazy state.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g2 (avoiding future commitments) by declining the club event. This prevents social friction and protects my immediate leisure time, aligning with my impulsive desire for zero stress now that the exam is secured.

goals.description: Spend the next 2 hours finishing the remaining 40% of midterm review to secure a 'pass' grade and eliminate immediate failure anxiety.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes academic outcomes (0.5) above all else, especially with a hard deadline tomorrow. My impulsive nature seeks a quick win now to avoid future stress, even though I'm tired. The social invitation is a low-value distraction that conflicts with my goal of securing this grade.

goals.description: Send a vague, non-committal text to Mina and Jae ('I'll check my schedule, might be late!' or similar) to deflect the club invite without a direct confrontation.
goals.rationale: I am highly conflict-avoidant. Directly saying 'no' creates interpersonal friction which I want to minimize. A soft deflection allows me to escape the social obligation while preserving the relationship surface-level trust, satisfying my need to avoid awkwardness without committing to the energy drain of the club.

goals.description: Ignore laundry until Sunday; do not start it tonight.
goals.rationale: Laundry has a distant deadline and offers no immediate reward. My short planning horizon means I will only act when the consequence (dirty clothes) becomes urgent. Spending time on laundry now would detract from the high-priority exam prep.

desires: Avoid the immediate stress of studying when I'm already tired and low on focus
Secure a quick win by finishing the exam prep now to prevent future failure anxiety
